Model "shallowness" is a big deal in the time of AI agents, models can be very good in narrow areas but since they are shallow, they lack context and reasoning to make good judgement calls when doing tasks. 

Once you are operating independently, being good at coding isn't enough
Evaluation of models is going to be a competitive edge for organizations that do it well.

GPT-5.2 Pro is a really solid fact checker. Put in anything you write into it and it hums away and gives you objections & caveats & "well, actually" qualifications, plus it checks your math

Outside of narrow areas (Academic pubs, New Yorker articles) this was not possible pre-AI
